sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي أَحْمَدُ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً فِي الْمَكْتَبِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed svaki dan provodi duge sate u kancelariji.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed spends long hours in the office every day.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّهُ يَهْتَمُّ أَيْضًا بِقَضَاءِ وَقْتٍ مُمْتِعٍ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ali on se također brine o provođenju ugodnog vremena sa svojom porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: But he also cares about spending enjoyable time with his family.

sentences.arabic: التَّوَازُنُ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالرَّاحَةِ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ravnoteža između rada i odmora neophodna je za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: The balance between work and rest is necessary for health.
